channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: U4: Front Zollamtsstraße from Marxergasse and Small Marxerbrücke to Unnamed Traffic Area and Wheel
item.description: Due to the renovation of the tunnel ceiling of the U4 line or the necessary preparatory work in the road area as well as the repair of shafts by the Vienna … [Since 01.02.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to the renovation of the tunnel ceiling of the U4 line or the necessary preparatory work in the road area as well as the repair of shafts by the Vienna …
[Since 01.02.2026]

item.title: 2A: construction works Renngasse
item.description: Because of pipeline works in the Renngasse the line 2A is being redirected. Period: Monday, 14. July 2025, 06:30, duration unknown. [Since 14.07.2025]
item.content:encoded:
Because of pipeline works in the Renngasse the line 2A is being redirected. Period: Monday, 14. July 2025, 06:30, duration unknown.
[Since 14.07.2025]

item.title: 46: track construction works
item.description: Operation only between Joachimsthalerplatz and Thaliastraße U. Continue to Josefstädter Straße U. Switch to alternative lines 2 and 48A. Expected … [16.03.2026 – 11.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Operation only between Joachimsthalerplatz and Thaliastraße U. Continue to Josefstädter Straße U. Switch to alternative lines 2 and 48A. Expected …
[16.03.2026 – 11.07.2026]

item.title: Gräffergasse from crossing Halirschgasse and Schultheßgasse to crossing Heigerleinstraße
item.description: The pipe laying work (preparation for underground construction) is carried out in general at day, with the Gräffergasse from the Halirschgasse and Schultheßgasse to the … [Since 19.10.2025]
item.content:encoded:
The pipe laying work (preparation for underground construction) is carried out in general at day, with the Gräffergasse from the Halirschgasse and Schultheßgasse to the …
[Since 19.10.2025]

item.title: N41: track construction works on Aumannplatz
item.description: track construction works in the Aumannplatz range results in an diversion. [Since 07.04.2026]
item.content:encoded:
track construction works in the Aumannplatz range results in an diversion.
[Since 07.04.2026]

item.title: Stadionbrücke from Ludwig-Koeßler-Platz and Erdberger Lands to Schüttelstraße and Stadionallee
item.description: The repair work and necessary conversion work on the Stadionbrücke due to the extension of the 18 tram line will be carried out in several phases of construction. [Since 03.02.2025]
item.content:encoded:
The repair work and necessary conversion work on the Stadionbrücke due to the extension of the 18 tram line will be carried out in several phases of construction.
[Since 03.02.2025]

item.title: Brünner Straße 59
item.description: The installation of a district heating line is carried out during the night from 20:00 to 05:00 with the release of a correspondingly wide residual runway of at least … [17.05.2026 – 14.08.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The installation of a district heating line is carried out during the night from 20:00 to 05:00 with the release of a correspondingly wide residual runway of at least …
[17.05.2026 – 14.08.2026]

item.title: Matzleinsdorfer Platz under structure ÖBB
item.description: In order to improve and increase the safety measures during the tunnelling work of the underground construction, one of the two … will be placed under the bridge structure of the ÖBB [Since 14.03.2021]
item.content:encoded:
In order to improve and increase the safety measures during the tunnelling work of the underground construction, one of the two … will be placed under the bridge structure of the ÖBB
[Since 14.03.2021]
